title: StalenessReviewPacket
description: Evidence packet for the staleness review loop. Code assembles this from source-freshness / instance-source-freshness records plus governance context. It is the input to the model-mediated staleness reviewer. Code owns structure and evidence; the model owns every semantic judgment (question, action, confidence, classification).

review_week.description: ISO-8601 week the review belongs to, e.g. 2026-W26. Used to date the surfaced packet.

as_of.description: The instant staleness was measured against. Lag is computed from as_of minus checked_at.

findings.description: Objective freshness findings. Each finding is faithful evidence serialized from a freshness record; it carries no judgment about whether the staleness matters.

constraints.description: Governance constraints the reviewer must honor, e.g. no auto-mutation without approval, model-mediated discipline.

allowed_outputs.description: The outputs the reviewer is permitted to return. Restricts the model's effect surface, not its judgment.

review_question.description: The model-mediated question the reviewer answers for each finding.

lag_seconds.description: as_of minus checked_at, in whole seconds. Objective fact, not judgment.

exceeds_stale_after.description: True when checked_at is at or beyond the record's own declared stale_after. Arithmetic on the record's own field, not semantic judgment.
